ModMetaData.name: RimWorld IFTTT Automation
ModMetaData.author: dhanj
ModMetaData.description:
IFTTT-style automation framework for RimWorld 1.6.
Create "If [Trigger] Then [Action]" rules to automate your colony. Rules support AND/OR trigger logic, per-trigger NOT inversion, ordered multi-action sequences, configurable check frequency, cooldowns, one-shot mode, and a priority system.
Access the panel via the [IFTTT] button in the bottom tab bar.
TRIGGERS (35+)
Combat - Under attack / colonist downed / fire on map - Enemy count above threshold / mechanoid present / raid incoming
Colony - Food level low / item count threshold / pawn mood low - Colonist idle / power failure / season / time of day / weather - Animal tamable / animal overpopulated / animal gear worn out* - Colonist count / research queue empty / bed capacity / mental break - Skill trainer (neurotrainer) available
Economy - Colony wealth above threshold / stockpile item count / trader arrived
Social - Faction goodwill below threshold / prisoner present - Orbital trader present / neutral faction nearby
Medical - Pawn has untended injury / pawn has disease - Pawn blood loss / pawn toxicity high
ACTIONS (25+)
Combat - Draft all shooters / undraft all colonists
Colony - Tame nearest animal / slaughter excess animals - Set research project / set pawn schedule / toggle work type - Haul items to stockpile / forbid all items - Use best skill trainer on best-matching pawn - Replace animal gear from storage*
Social - Cheer up saddest pawn / recruit prisoner / release prisoner - Contact orbital trader / call allied trader / gift silver to faction
Medical - Tend most critically injured pawn / rescue downed pawn
Alerts - Pause game / send alert message / notify player / request supply drop
RULE SETTINGS
- Check frequency: every 15 min up to every 15 days (per rule) - Cooldown: minimum time between firings - Priority: lower number evaluated first - One-shot: disables rule after first fire - Max fires cap - AND / OR trigger mode with per-trigger NOT inversion - Categories: Combat / Colony / Economy / Social / Medical / Research / Alerts / Custom
* Requires Animal Apparel Framework (Workshop ID 3513825850)
